rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in the component type scope if they refer to component ports.
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations when defining range assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are defined within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use visible identifiers (ports, features) from the AADL model in AGREE contracts.
Focus on relating visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Define boolean ranges using `eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;`
Use `eq` to define boolean helper variables for clarity.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-level subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Avoid encoding AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly as AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction details (component types, implementations, features, connections, properties, owners)
Model fusion owner/scope and preservation rules
